title: Geepas Electric Blender Smoothie Maker, Jug Blender 2 in 1 - 400W, White | Stainless Steel Blades| 1.5L Jar | Chopper, Coffee Grinder Smoothie Milkshake Maker,1 pack
features: POWERFUL COPPER MOTOR- The 400W power of this 2 in 1 multifunctional blender allows you to cope with hard fruits & vegetables, ideal for creating quick, easy, nutritious drinks and smoothies on the go - simply load, blend and go! Create delicious smoothies and shakes, blend soups and sauces with confidence.

1.5 L PLASTIC JAR CAPACITY, SMART LID - with a jar this big you can blend huge amounts of fruits, vegetables, coffee & Spices. It helps to save time on cutting fruits or vegetables & instantly get a glass of tasty & healthy juice within a few seconds, and allows larger portions of soups or smoothies to be made at once, perfect for batch cooking or serving a family. The smart lid with filling hole lets you add ingredients safely and easily when the blender is in use.

2 SPEED CONTROL WITH PULSE, SAFETY LOCK & NON-SLIP - Keep control over your blending and juicing creations with the dual speed functions. And with "Pulse" function it gives option to use full blade speed in bursts to blend hard chunky ingredients quicker. Added with rubber non-slip mat, can make the chassis more stable and less noise while the motor is working, that will be perfect for family and personal use.

STAINLESS STEEL CUTTING BLADES - With these long span blades made of stainless steel, you can cut all kinds of fruits and vegetables. Simple to use, suitable for any level of kitchen confidence, and can create healthy and nutritious drinks in a matter of minutes. Enjoy healthy life to make fruit and vegetable juices, milkshakes, smoothies, cocktails and more in a short time., and be on your way to the gym, class or office.
2 YEARS WARRANTY INCLUDED, VERSATILE - With the choice of chopping, blending, mixing, and grinding to produce all types of textures to tantalise your taste buds.
description: Product Description Geepas 400W 2in1 Multifunctional Blender The Geepas 2-in-1 multifunctional blenders can mix, grind coffee, spices, nuts, mill, and soya bean milkshake, smoothies, vegetables, fresh juices and these are not the last of its features from a whole list. In seconds you can create cool, smooth and great tasting drinks and smoothies containing all of the nutrients and vitamins of your favorite fruits and vegetables. Simply put fruits and vegetables and close the lid then press the button to blend your drink. Powerful 400W motor and specially designed stainless steel blades, creating pulse, pause, and blending patterns. 400W HIGH POWERED BLENDING With a powerful motor, it quickly makes healthy smoothies, protein shakes energy drinks, blending fruit, sauces, and more, in a matter of minutes. The unique 4-blade stainless steel blades make the blending fast and powerful. POWERFUL MOTOR The 400W power of this 2 in 1 multifunctional blender allows you to cope with hard fruits & vegetables, ideal for creating quick, easy, nutritious drinks, protein shakes and healthy smoothies on the go - simply load, blend and go! PERFECT FOR HOME KITCHENS This jug blender is ideal for home kitchens - It's stylish, convenient and practical and you can use it to create a huge variety, from smoothies to grinding nuts and coffee beans MULTI-FUNCTIONAL Use this jug blender for making soups, dips, smoothies, purees, and more with a simple one dial control and minimal mess. Capacity: 1500ml EASY CLEAN The jug blender is made from a robust plastic which is easy to clean and suited for all kitchens - The removable jug makes cleaning safe and mess-free Geepas 2-in-1 Jug Blender Geepas 2-in-1 Jug Blender Geepas 2-in-1 Jug Blender Geepas 3-in-1 Jug Blender Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 1,359 3.8 out of 5 stars 1,359 — 3.8 out of 5 stars 1,359 Price £29.99 £ 29 . 99 — no data — no data — no data Wattage 400W 400W 400W 500W Speed 2 4 2 8 Pulse Function ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ No. of Jars 2 2 2 3 Stainless Steel Blades ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
